content: The site navigation utilizes keyboard functionality using the arrow keys, enter, escape, and spacebar commands. Arrow keys can navigate between previous/next items and also move down into a nested menu. Enter will open a nested menu and escape will close the current menu. Spacebar will open the current menu.
